segments.original_text: 対面のウェビーでも届きましたね

segments.text: Grabbed in the air and sent off!
segments.original_text: 空中に取れる 外に出される

segments.text: They're going deep with the edge guard but...
segments.original_text: ここは深くまで追ってくるが

segments.text: Coming back with the platform tech!
segments.original_text: 逆に踏みで返していくのや

full_text: It connects even straight on! Grabbed in the air and sent off! They're going deep with the edge guard but... Coming back with the platform tech!
